text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our major goal to compete in the Tokyo
Daishoten is fast approaching. Meanwhile, I put
Inari One down for the autumn Tenno Sho to
build some experience in big races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Here, she'll have two of the best racers in her
generation to contend with!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This showdown is bound to fuel Inari One's
passion!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap, the Beast... and Tamamo Cross, or
White Lightnin'.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, sure is somethin' to be lined up next to
them. Makes me want a nickname of my own!
choice_data_list: Yeah, it's going to be a tough race.
Yeah, it's going to be a tough race.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I know that! Some folks are callin' this the battle
for the top!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And I'm gonna be smack dab in the middle of it! I
can't wait to get a taste of this festival!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I finally get to race against you, Oguri. I've been
lookin' forward to this day for a long time.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Are you all right? Did you get enough sleep
yesterday? Did you eat enough food?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Why da hell are ya worryin' over my wellbein'?! Ya
sound like you're sendin' your kid off to camp!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I slept like a log. And I ate all my meals.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Because I've been looking forward to today.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Heh, good. Bring it on.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, Oguri. Today, I'm beatin' ya down to a
pulp. I'll show everyone who's the best in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: So ya better be ready.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sure. I'm more than ready... to win.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Haha! I didn't know ya had a cool comeback up
your sleeve.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It's racin' time... Let's get this started, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wow, Tama and Oguri are all in!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Tamamo Cross may be a pip-squeak, but she's
got a good pair of legs and one heck of a fightin'
spirit. I know she's the same ol' Tama standin'
next to the same ol' Oguri, but...)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Crap, they both look so threatenin'... But that
makes this all the better!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
This may be your festival, but I'm gonna be the
grand finale!
